profile.dataChallenge: Manual order corrections consuming 240 hours/month, 18% error rate causing customer dissatisfaction

beforeState.systems: Legacy ECC 6.0, on-premise BW, Excel-based order reconciliation
painPoints: Average 4.5 hours per order correction cycle
No real-time visibility into order status

solution.approach: Phased rollout: pilot 50 stores, scale to 500 over 3 months

additionalBenefits: Real-time order tracking across all locations
Predictive error detection (catch 73% before order submission)

cases.quote: Datasphere + AI Core transformed our operations from reactive firefighting to predictive excellence. We went from spending 240 hours a month fixing errors to 35 hours—and most of those are edge cases the AI flagged proactively.
lessonsLearned: Start with highest-error locations for quick wins
Invest in change management—store managers were skeptical initially
AI model accuracy improved 40% after 60 days of production data

profile.dataChallenge: 14 siloed systems, inconsistent reporting, 3-week lag for financial close

beforeState.systems: ECC 6.0 EHP7, legacy BW, custom .NET apps, Salesforce CRM, 6 regional data marts
painPoints: 14 different systems with no single source of truth
Finance team spent 2 weeks per month reconciling reports
C-suite dashboards updated manually in PowerPoint
Regional GMs made decisions on 2-week-old data

solution.approach: Big-bang S4 cutover, phased Datasphere integration

outcome.dataConsolidation: Unified 14 systems into single Datasphere data model
additionalBenefits: CFO no longer needs external consultants for board reporting
Freed 1.5 FTEs from manual reporting to analytics

cases.quote: Before Datasphere, we had 14 versions of the truth. Now we have one golden source, and our GMs make decisions on live data. It's not just a technical win—it's a cultural transformation.
lessonsLearned: Run S4 and Datasphere projects in parallel, not sequential
Involve finance team early—they became the biggest advocates
Don't underestimate historical data migration (added 6 weeks)

profile.dataChallenge: Legacy BW performance bottlenecks, 12-hour overnight batch jobs, cloud migration mandate

beforeState.systems: ECC on-premise, BW 7.5 on aging hardware, Tableau for dashboards
painPoints: Overnight batch jobs completing at 11am (missing morning meetings)
Unable to handle Black Friday traffic spikes

components: SAP AI Core for demand forecasting
solution.approach: Wave-based: critical reports first, then historical migration, finally decommission BW

additionalBenefits: Black Friday traffic scaled elastically (no outages)
Real-time inventory visibility enabled same-day ship-from-store

cases.quote: Moving from overnight batch to real-time changed everything. Our store managers now see inventory updates within minutes, not the next morning. And we decommissioned a $2.3M data center. Revolutionary.
lessonsLearned: Wave-based migration de-risks big bang approach
Keep BW parallel for 60 days (caught 3 edge-case bugs)
Cloud elasticity saved us during holiday peak—scaled 4x capacity in 2 hours

successFactors: Pilot with high-impact use case (60-90 days to value)
Strong change management and user adoption focus
